return(function(H,U,X,p,R,w,S,Z,M,b,j,I,x,a,q,g,d,e,s,P,n,L,k,O,Y)g,x,Y,a,j,k,s,n,M,e,P,d,O,b,L,q,I,Z=function(H,F)local U=b(F)local X=function(X)return Y(H,{X},F,U)end return X end,function(H,F)local U=b(F)local X=function(...)return Y(H,{...},F,U)end return X end,function(H,F)local U=b(F)local X=function(X,p,R,w,S,I,x,a,P)return Y(H,{X,p;R;w;S,I;x;a,P},F,U)end return X end,function(H)local F,Y=-979525-(-979526),H[-95577-(-95578)]while Y do x[Y],F=x[Y]-(-617978-(-617979)),(-852570-(-852571))+F if 976675+-976675==x[Y]then x[Y],I[Y]=nil,nil end Y=H[F]end
